text.en: China Fasteners to Zimbabwe Procurement Guide
text.zh: 中国紧固件到津巴布韦采购指南

body.en:
Zimbabwe's mining sector contributes approximately 12% of national GDP and accounts for 80% of the country's exports, with platinum group metals (PGMs), gold, and chrome as the three pillars of this industry. The country holds the world's second-largest PGM reserves—approximately 2.8 billion tonnes—alongside 10 billion tonnes of high-grade chromium ore. Operations range from Zimplats' underground platinum mines at Ngezi to surface gold workings across Gwanda and Kadoma, and the chrome-rich Great Dyke formations.

Selecting the correct fastener grade is not a generic engineering exercise in Zimbabwe's mining environment. Underground operations at Ngezi and Selous face acidic mine water with pH levels as low as 3-5 from sulfide ore deposits. Open-pit chrome operations involve chemical exposure from processing reagents. Tailings storage facilities use water with elevated chloride and sulfate content. Each of these environments demands specific fastener material and grade specifications to prevent premature failure, unplanned maintenance downtime, and safety risks.

A fastener failure in a conveyor system or crusher assembly can halt an entire processing circuit—costing thousands of dollars per hour in lost production. This guide covers the correct fastener grades, international standards, and coating systems for Zimbabwe's three primary mining applications: platinum group metal (PGM) mining, gold mining, and chrome mining.

For our grade 10.9 hex bolt catalog, see grade 10.9 hex bolts. For underground mining specifications, browse mining fastener solutions.
body.zh:
津巴布韦矿业为国家GDP贡献约12%，占该国出口额的80%，铂族金属（PGM）、黄金和铬是该行业的三大支柱。该国拥有世界第二大PGM储量——约28亿吨——以及100亿吨高品位铬矿石。运营范围从Zimplats在Ngezi的地下铂金矿到Gwanda和Kadoma的地表金矿，以及铬矿资源丰富的Great Dyke成矿带。

在津巴布韦的采矿环境中，选择正确的紧固件等级并非通用工程问题。Ngezi和Selous的地下作业面临来自硫化物矿石沉积的pH值低至3-5的酸性矿井水。露天铬矿作业涉及来自加工试剂的化学暴露。尾矿储存设施使用含有较高氯化物和硫酸盐的水。每个环境都要求特定的紧固件材料和等级规格，以防止过早失效、计划外维护停机和安全风险。

输送系统或破碎机组件中的紧固件失效可能导致整个加工回路停机——每小时损失数千美元的生产损失。本指南涵盖津巴布韦三大主要采矿应用的正确紧固件等级、国际标准和涂层系统：铂族金属（PGM）采矿、黄金采矿和铬矿开采。
body.es:
El sector minero de Zimbabwe contribuye aproximadamente el 12% del PIB nacional y representa el 80% de las exportaciones del país, siendo los metales del grupo del platino (MGP), el oro y el cromo los tres pilares de esta industria. El país posee las segundas reservas de MGP más grandes del mundo—aproximadamente 2.8 mil millones de toneladas—junto con 10 mil millones de toneladas de mineral de cromo de alta ley.

Seleccionar el grado correcto de sujetador no es un ejercicio de ingeniería genérico en el entorno minero de Zimbabwe. Las operaciones subterráneas en Ngezi y Selous enfrentan agua ácida de mina con niveles de pH tan bajos como 3-5. Las operaciones de cromo a cielo abierto implican exposición química. Las instalaciones de almacenamiento de relaves utilizan agua con alto contenido de cloruro y sulfato.

يساهم قطاع التعدين في زيمبابوي بنسبة 12% تقريباً من الناتج المحلي الإجمالي الوطني ويمثل 80% من صادرات البلاد، حيث تشكل معادن مجموعة البلاتين (PGM) والذهب والكروم الأعمدة الثلاثة لهذه الصناعة.

ليس اختيار درجة المثبت الصحيحة تمريناً هندسياً عاماً في بيئة التعدين في زيمبابوي. تواجه العمليات تحت الأرض في Ngezi وSelous مياه منجمية حمضية بمستويات pH منخفضة تصل إلى 3-5.

जिम्बाब्वे की खनन वातावरण में सही फास्टनर ग्रेड का चयन एक सामान्य इंजीनियरिंग अभ्यास नहीं है। Ngezi और Selous में भूमिगत संचालन सल्फाइड अयस्क जमाव से pH 3-5 जितना कम अम्लीय खान के पानी का सामना करते हैं।

body.en:
Zimplats, Zimbabwe's largest platinum producer, operates both opencast and underground mines at Ngezi south of Harare, with ore processing at the Selous Metallurgical Complex approximately 77 km away. The company announced a US$1.8 billion investment plan for the next decade to expand underground mining capacity. Other key players include Mimosa Platinum Mines and Unki Platinum Mine, both also on the Great Dyke. Underground mechanized mining in these operations involves heavy mobile equipment, conveyor systems, crushers, and ventilation infrastructure—all requiring high-strength, corrosion-resistant fasteners.

Recommended Fastener Grades for Platinum Mining

For underground PGM mining equipment, the following specifications apply:

  • Primary structural connections: ASTM A325 high-strength structural bolts, Grade 10.9, hot-dip galvanized. These are used in flange connections for conveyor structures, crusher mounting frames, and head-frames where combined shear and tension loads occur.
  • Equipment assembly and maintenance: ISO 898-1 Grade 10.9 hex bolts with DIN 933 fully threaded specification for adjustable connections in crusher jaw plates, screen deck mounts, and pump housing fasteners.
  • High-stress mechanical joints: ISO 898-1 Grade 12.9 socket head cap screws for hydraulic cylinder attachments, dragline bucket connections, and heavy-duty mill liner fasteners where space constraints require higher strength-to-size ratios.
  • Ground support and rock anchoring: ASTM F1554 Grade 105 anchor bolts for tunnel support systems and hanging wall reinforcement plates in line with SABS 868 underground mining standards.

Corrosion Protection for Underground Platinum Mines

Underground mine water in Zimbabwe's PGM deposits typically has low pH (3-5) due to sulfide oxidation, elevated total dissolved solids (TDS 2,000-8,000 mg/L), and significant chloride content from geological formations. Standard hot-dip galvanizing (HDG) providing 50-80 μm coating is the minimum specification. For severe exposure areas—dewatering pipelines, pump housings, and ventilation duct supports—consider duplex coating systems: HDG base layer (60 μm) plus epoxy top coat (120 μm), achieving 400+ hours salt spray resistance per ISO 9227.

Zimplats' Ngezi underground operations specifically require fastener documentation including material certificates (EN 10204 Type 3.1), batch traceability, and third-party inspection reports for all Grade 10.9 and above fasteners entering the site. Buyers should specify DIN 267/ISO 898-2 compliance for nut and washer compatibility.

Browse our hot-dip galvanized bolts and A4-70 stainless steel fasteners.
body.zh:
Zimplats是津巴布韦最大的铂金生产商，在哈拉雷以南的Ngezi运营露天和地下矿山，矿石在距矿场约77公里的Selous冶金综合体进行加工。该公司宣布未来十年将投资18亿美元扩大地下采矿能力。其他主要参与者包括Mimosa Platinum Mines和Unki Platinum Mine，均位于Great Dyke。在这些作业中，地下机械化采矿涉及重型移动设备、输送系统、破碎机和通风基础设施——所有这些都需要高强度、耐腐蚀的紧固件。

铂金采矿推荐紧固件等级

对于地下PGM采矿设备，适用以下规格：

  • 主要结构连接：ASTM A325高强度结构螺栓、10.9级、热镀锌。用于输送机结构、破碎机安装框架和井架的法兰连接，这些地方会出现剪切和拉伸 combined载荷。
  • 设备装配和维护：ISO 898-1 10.9级六角螺栓，DIN 933全螺纹规格，用于破碎机颚板、筛网支架和泵壳体紧固件中的可调连接。
  • 高应力机械接头：ISO 898-1 12.9级内六角螺钉，用于液压缸附件、挖掘机铲斗连接和重型磨机衬板紧固件，在空间受限需要更高强度重量比的情况下使用。
  • 地层支护和岩石锚固：ASTM F1554 105级锚栓，用于隧道支护系统和悬挂墙加固板，符合SABS 868地下采矿标准。

地下铂金矿防腐保护

津巴布韦PGM矿床的地下水通常因硫化物氧化而pH值低（3-5），总溶解固体（TDS 2,000-8,000 mg/L）较高，氯化物含量来自地层结构。标准热镀锌（HDG）提供50-80 μm涂层是最小规格。对于严重暴露区域（排水管道、泵壳体、通风管道支架），考虑双涂层系统：HDG底漆层（60 μm）加环氧面漆（120 μm），达到ISO 9227盐雾测试400+小时。

Zimplats的Ngezi地下作业 specifically要求紧固件文件，包括材料证书（EN 10204 Type 3.1）、批次可追溯性和所有10.9级及以上紧固件的三方检验报告。买方应指定DIN 267/ISO 898-2合规性以确保螺母和垫圈兼容性。
body.es:
Zimplats, el mayor productor de platino de Zimbabwe, opera minas a cielo abierto y subterráneas en Ngezi, al sur de Harare, con procesamiento de mineral en el Complejo Metalúrgico de Selous a aproximadamente 77 km. La empresa anunció un plan de inversión de US$1.8 mil millones para la próxima década.

Grados de Sujetadores Recomendados para Minería de Platino

  • Conexiones estructurales primarias: Pernos estructurales de alta resistencia ASTM A325, Grado 10.9, galvanizados en caliente.
  • Ensamblaje y mantenimiento de equipos: Pernos hexagonales ISO 898-1 Grado 10.9 con especificación DIN 933 completamente roscada.
body.ar:
Zimplats، أكبر منتج للبلاتين في زيمبابوي، تشغل مناجم مفتوحة وتحت الأرض في Ngezi جنوب هراري. أعلنت الشركة خطة استثمارية بقيمة 1.8 مليار دولار للسنوات العشر القادمة.

درجات المثبتات الموصى بها لتعدين البلاتين

  • الاتصالات الهيكلية الأولية: براغي هيكلية عالية القوة ASTM A325، درجة 10.9، مجلفنة بالغمس الساخن.
body.fr:
Zimplats, le plus grand producteur de platine du Zimbabwe, exploite des mines à ciel ouvert et souterraines à Ngezi. L'entreprise a annoncé un plan d'investissement de 1,8 milliard de dollars pour les dix prochaines années.

Grades de Fixations Recommandés pour l'Exploitation du Platine

  • Connexions structurelles primaires: Boulons structurels haute résistance ASTM A325, Grade 10.9, galvanisés à chaud.

body.en:
Zimbabwe's gold mining sector, centered around Gwanda, Kwekwe, Kadoma, and the Bindura region, historically drove the country's mining industry before platinum discovery. Both large-scale operations (Blanket Mine, RENM Gold, Jena Mine) and thousands of small-scale artisanal miners operate across these greenstone belts. Gold mining operations typically involve surface processing plants, heap leaching facilities, ball and SAG mills, and cyanide leaching tanks—all requiring fasteners selected for their specific mechanical and corrosion environments.

Recommended Fastener Grades for Gold Mining

Gold mining fastener selection differs from platinum because most operations are at shallower depths and involve less aggressive chemical environments, though cyanide processing introduces its own challenges:

  • Processing plant structural work: ASTM A325 Grade 8.8 hot-dip galvanized bolts for conveyor gallery connections, steel structure erection, and processing tank support frames. Where weld-free field assembly is required, specify ASTM F1554 Grade 36 or 55 for anchor bolts.
  • Mill and crusher fasteners: Grade 10.9 ISO 898-1 hex bolts for ball mill shell plate attachments, SAG mill trommel screen frames, and cone crusher mantle clamping systems. These experience high cyclic loading from ore impact and grinding media motion.
  • Cyanide leaching and tank farms: Grade 8.8 stainless steel A2-70 (304) or A4-70 (316) bolts are strongly recommended for tank flanges, pipe supports, and agitation shaft connections in cyanide service. Standard carbon steel with HDG will suffer galvanic corrosion in cyanide environments. For chloride-rich process water circuits, A4-70 (316 stainless) is mandatory per ISO 3506-1.
  • Artisanal and small-scale mining: ASTM A307 Grade A carbon steel bolts with HDG coating provide adequate performance for portable crushing units, gold sluice box frames, and light structural work where budget constraints limit fastener specification options.

Gold Mining Corrosion Considerations

The primary corrosion challenge in Zimbabwe gold processing is cyanide solution chemistry. Sodium cyanide (NaCN) is used at concentrations of 200-500 mg/L in leaching circuits. While cyanide itself is not highly corrosive to steel, the process water often contains dissolved oxygen and trace metals that accelerate galvanic corrosion. Fastener specification for gold processing plants should mandate ASTM A194 Grade 8 nuts (alloy steel, HDG) paired with ASTM A325 bolts to prevent galling and seizing in high-humidity processing environments.

Browse our hot-dip galvanized bolts and A4-70 stainless steel fasteners.
body.zh:
津巴布韦的黄金采矿业集中于Gwanda、Kwekwe、Kadoma和Bindura地区，在发现铂金之前是该国矿业的主要驱动力。大型作业（Blanket Mine、RENM Gold、Jena Mine）和数千名小型 artisanal miners在这些绿岩带中运营。黄金采矿作业通常涉及地表选矿厂、堆浸设施、球磨机和SAG磨机以及氰化物浸出槽——所有这些都需要根据其特定机械和腐蚀环境选择紧固件。

黄金采矿推荐紧固件等级

  • 选矿厂结构工程：ASTM A325 8.8级热镀锌螺栓用于输送机通廊连接、钢结构安装和加工槽支撑框架。
  • 磨机和破碎机紧固件：ISO 898-1 10.9级六角螺栓用于球磨机壳板附件、SAG磨机筛框和圆锥破碎机轧臼壁夹紧系统。
  • 氰化物浸出和槽区：建议使用A2-70（304）或A4-70（316）8.8级不锈钢螺栓，用于槽法兰、管道支架和氰化物服务中的搅拌轴连接。

body.en:
Zimbabwe holds approximately 10 billion tonnes of high-grade chromium ore reserves, primarily along the Great Dyke geological formation. Chrome mining operations range from large-scale mechanized operations (Zimasco, Afrochine Energy, Shanxi Zhongye) to small-scale artisanal miners. Processing chrome ore involves smelting in electric arc furnaces (EAF) to produce ferrochrome (FeCr) alloy—an energy-intensive process that creates some of the most demanding fastener environments in any mining operation globally.

Recommended Fastener Grades for Chrome Mining and Processing

The chrome mining and ferrochrome production environment presents unique fastener challenges:

  • Furnace and smelting infrastructure: Grade 12.9 ISO 898-1 socket head cap screws with inorganic zinc silicate coating (min. 80 μm DFT) for EAF shell connections, electrode holder assemblies, and off-gas duct supports. These joints experience temperatures up to 200°C in off-gas pathways. Standard HDG is unsuitable above 200°C due to zinc melting point constraints—specify 'high-temperature galvanizing alternative' coatings from your supplier.
  • Chrome ore processing and handling: A4-70 (316 stainless) hex bolts and nuts for slurry pipeline flanges, classifier housings, and heavy media separation equipment. Chrome ore slurry contains fine chromium particles with pH 5-7 from water addition, creating an abrasive and mildly corrosive medium. A4-70 per ISO 3506-1 provides the necessary chloride crevice corrosion resistance.
  • Tailings storage facility (TSF) embankment monitoring equipment: Grade 10.9 HDG bolts for piezometer mounting, settlement plates, and seepage collection system brackets. The tailings from chrome processing have elevated chromium VI (Cr VI) content requiring corrosion-resistant fastener systems beyond standard HDG alone.
  • Ferrochrome transport and storage: Grade 8.8 HDG bolts for rail wagon body attachments and conveyor take-up assemblies at stockyard facilities. Standard HDG coating provides adequate protection for outdoor storage of finished ferrochrome prior to export via Beira Port.

Chrome Processing Corrosion Challenges

Ferrochrome smelting operations generate chromium-containing dust and condensates that settle on equipment surfaces. In the presence of moisture (humidity >60%), hexavalent chromium compounds form on fastener surfaces, causing stress corrosion cracking (SCC) in susceptible materials. Grade 8.8 and 10.9 carbon steel fasteners without adequate coating will fail prematurely through SCC. Only austenitic stainless steel (A2-70/A4-70) or properly coated alloy steel fasteners should be used in these zones. Zimasco's Kwekwe smelter operations specifically require material test reports (MTRs) for all fasteners used within the smelter building envelope.

For ASTM F1554 anchor bolt specs, see anchor bolts and ASTM A325 structural bolts.
body.zh:
津巴布韦拥有约100亿吨高品位铬矿石储量，主要位于Great Dyke地质构造带。铬矿开采作业包括大型机械化作业（Zimasco、Afrochine Energy、山西中冶）和小型artisan矿工。铬矿加工涉及电弧炉（EAF）中的冶炼以生产 ferrochrome（FeCr）合金——这是一种能源密集型工艺，在任何采矿作业中都会产生要求最苛刻的紧固件环境。

铬矿开采和加工推荐紧固件等级

  • 炉子和冶炼基础设施：ISO 898-1 12.9级内六角螺钉配无机硅酸锌涂层（最小80 μm DFT），用于EAF外壳连接、电极夹组件和废气管道支架。
  • 铬矿加工和处理：A4-70（316不锈钢）六角螺栓和螺母，用于矿浆管道法兰、分类器壳体和重介质分离设备。

body.en:
This section provides a concise technical reference for the international fastener standards most relevant to Zimbabwe mining applications. All fasteners supplied through TradeGo for mining applications comply with the following standards as a minimum requirement:

ISO 898-1:2024 — Mechanical Properties of Fasteners

The governing international standard for bolt mechanical properties. Defines property classes 8.8, 10.9, and 12.9 with minimum tensile and yield strength requirements:

  • 8.8: Ultimate tensile strength Rm ≥ 800 MPa, yield strength Rp0.2 ≥ 640 MPa. Suitable for medium-stress structural and equipment connections.
  • 10.9: Ultimate tensile strength Rm ≥ 1,040 MPa, yield strength Rp0.2 ≥ 940 MPa. The workhorse grade for Zimbabwe mining equipment assembly—conveyor structures, crusher mounts, pump housings.
  • 12.9: Ultimate tensile strength Rm ≥ 1,220 MPa, yield strength Rp0.2 ≥ 1,100 MPa. For highest-stress applications: hydraulic cylinder pins, mill liner systems, dragline bucket joints.

ISO 898-1:2024 also covers acceptable materials (boron-alloyed and carbon-alloyed steels), heat treatment requirements, and proof load test methods. Always request batch test certificates per this standard.

ASTM A307-21 — Carbon Steel Structural Bolts (Grade A)

Standard specification for low-carbon steel structural bolts, ¼ to 4 inches diameter. Minimum tensile strength 420 MPa (60 ksi). ASTM A307 Grade A is the most economical choice for non-critical structural connections in Zimbabwe gold mining surface facilities,artisanal mining equipment, and general construction. NOT suitable for dynamic or high-stress applications.

ASTM A325-21 — High-Strength Structural Bolts

The primary standard for high-strength structural bolts in North American and internationally adopted mining construction. Covers three types: Type 1 (medium carbon steel, HDG), Type 2 (low carbon martensite steel, HDG), Type 3 (weathering steel, uncoated). Property requirements: Grade 8.8 equivalent (120 ksi tensile). ASTM A325 Type 1 HDG is the standard fastener for Zimplats and other Zimbabwe PGM mine structural steel connections.

ASTM F1554-22 — Anchor Bolts

Standard specification for headed, headless, and bent anchor bolts. Three grades: Grade 36 (250 MPa yield, A36 steel), Grade 55 (380 MPa yield, A36/A572 Grade 55 steel), Grade 105 (720 MPa yield, A193 B7 material). ASTM F1554 Grade 105 is the standard specification for anchor bolts in mine crusher foundations, conveyor gantry bases, and mill motor seat foundations. Specify galvanizing per ASTM F2329 where applicable.

DIN 933 — Hex Cap Screws (Fully Threaded)

German dimensional standard for hex cap screws (heavy series) with full thread engagement. Widely used in Chinese fastener manufacturing and compatible with ISO 4017. TradeGo stocks DIN 933 Grade 10.9 hex bolts in M10-M36 sizes for Zimbabwe mining equipment assembly. Specify DIN 933 when ordering fully threaded hex bolts for adjustable connections.

GB/T 5782 — Hex Bolts (Chinese National Standard)

China's national standard for hex bolts, equivalent to ISO 4014. GB/T 5782.1-2016 covers product grades A (close tolerance) and B (general tolerance), with property classes matching ISO 898-1 (8.8, 10.9, 12.9). Chinese-manufactured Grade 10.9 hex bolts per GB/T 5782 are fully interchangeable with DIN 933 and ISO 4017 equivalents for Zimbabwe mining applications. Always request mill test certificates confirming GB/T 5782 / ISO 898-1 dual compliance.

Browse our hot-dip galvanized bolts and A4-70 stainless steel fasteners.
body.zh:
本节提供与津巴布韦采矿应用最相关的国际紧固件标准的技术参考。通过TradeGo供应的所有采矿应用紧固件至少符合以下标准：

ISO 898-1:2024 — 紧固件机械性能

紧固件螺栓机械性能的国际标准。定义8.8、10.9和12.9级以及最低拉伸和屈服强度要求：

  • 8.8：极限抗拉强度Rm≥800 MPa，屈服强度Rp0.2≥640 MPa。适用于中等应力结构和设备连接。
  • 10.9：极限抗拉强度Rm≥1,040 MPa，屈服强度Rp0.2≥940 MPa。津巴布韦采矿设备 assembly 的主要等级——输送机结构、破碎机支架、泵壳。
  • 12.9：极限抗拉强度Rm≥1,220 MPa，屈服强度Rp0.2≥1,100 MPa。用于最高应力应用：液压缸销、磨机衬板系统、挖掘机铲斗接头。

ASTM A307-21 — 碳钢结构螺栓（A级）

低碳钢结构螺栓的标准规范，直径¼至4英寸。最小抗拉强度420 MPa。ASTM A307 A级是津巴布韦黄金采矿地表设施中最经济的选择。

ASTM A325-21 — 高强度结构螺栓

北美和国际上采用的高强度结构螺栓的主要标准。覆盖三种类型：Type 1（中碳钢，HDG）、Type 2（低碳马氏体钢，HDG）、Type 3（耐候钢，无涂层）。ASTM A325 Type 1 HDG是Zimplats和其他津巴布韦PGM矿结构钢连接的标准紧固件。

ASTM F1554-22 — 锚栓

头式、无头式和弯曲锚栓的标准规范。三个等级：36级（250 MPa屈服，A36钢）、55级（380 MPa屈服）、105级（720 MPa屈服，A193 B7材料）。ASTM F1554 105级是矿山破碎机基础、输送机柱脚和磨机电机底座基础锚栓的标准规格。

body.en:
Pricing for mining fasteners destined for Zimbabwe varies significantly by mechanical grade, corrosion protection coating system, steel composition, and order quantity. The following estimates are FOB China port (typically Tianjin or Shanghai) for orders of 5+ metric tons, as of Q2 2026. Actual landed costs in Zimbabwe include sea freight to Beira Port, Mozambican transit, and road transport to final destination.

Grade 8.8 Carbon Steel Fasteners

  • Plain (uncoated): USD 1,500-2,200 per metric ton. Suitable for indoor, low-humidity gold mine processing environments where aesthetic corrosion is acceptable.
  • Hot-dip galvanized (HDG, 50-80 μm): USD 2,200-3,500 per metric ton. The standard specification for surface gold mining structural work and chrome processing external pipework.
  • Zinc-electroplated (5-15 μm): USD 1,700-2,400 per metric ton. Indoor use only; insufficient for any Zimbabwe outdoor or mining environment.

Grade 10.9 High-Strength Fasteners

  • Plain: USD 2,500-3,800 per metric ton. For applications where HDG will be applied on-site or where coating is not required.
  • Hot-dip galvanized (HDG): USD 3,500-5,200 per metric ton. The standard workhorse grade for Zimplats and other Zimbabwe PGM mine equipment assembly. Most requested specification for underground mining applications.
  • Duplex coating (HDG + epoxy top coat): USD 5,500-7,500 per metric ton. For the most demanding underground mine water exposure zones—dewatering pump housings, primary crusher foundations, main ventilation duct supports.

Grade 12.9 High-Strength Fasteners

  • Plain or phosphate-coated: USD 4,000-6,000 per metric ton. For hydraulic system fasteners and mill liner bolts where coating is applied after installation or where fastener will operate in enclosed, non-corrosive environment.
  • Hot-dip galvanized: USD 5,500-8,000 per metric ton. For dragline bucket connections and primary crusher jaw plate clamp bolts where high strength plus corrosion protection is required.
  • Inorganic zinc silicate (80+ μm DFT): USD 6,000-9,000 per metric ton. Mandatory for chrome smelter off-gas system fasteners operating above 200°C.

Stainless Steel Fasteners (A2/A4 Series)

  • A2-70 (304 stainless) hex bolts and nuts: USD 8,000-12,000 per metric ton. For cyanide leaching tank flanges and process pipe supports in gold mining.
  • A4-70 (316 stainless) hex bolts and nuts: USD 10,000-15,000 per metric ton. For chrome ore slurry handling, chloride-rich process water, and marine transit environments (Beira Port exposure).

Landed Cost Estimates (CIF Harare, Zimbabwe)

To estimate CIF Harare landed cost, add approximately USD 350-500/ton for sea freight (Tianjin → Beira Port, 20-25 days), USD 80-120/ton for Beira Port handling and Mozambican transit documentation, and USD 150-250/ton for road transport Harare. Total landed cost multiplier: approximately 1.25-1.35 × FOB China price for full-container shipments.

Browse our hot-dip galvanized bolts and A4-70 stainless steel fasteners.
body.zh:
运往津巴布韦的矿业紧固件价格因机械等级、防腐涂层系统、钢材成分和订购量而有很大差异。以下估算为FOB中国港口（通常为天津或上海）价格，适用于5公吨以上的订单，截至2026年第二季度。津巴布韦的 actual 到岸成本包括到贝拉港的海运、莫桑比克转运和到最终目的地的公路运输。

8.8级碳钢紧固件

  • plain（无涂层）：每公吨USD 1,500-2,200。适用于室内、低湿度黄金选矿环境。
  • 热镀锌（HDG，50-80 μm）：每公吨USD 2,200-3,500。地表金矿结构工程和铬矿加工外部管道工程的标准规格。

10.9级高强度紧固件

  • Plain：每公吨USD 2,500-3,800。
  • 热镀锌（HDG）：每公吨USD 3,500-5,200。Zimplats和其他津巴布韦PGM矿山设备组装的标准规格。
  • 双涂层（HDG +环氧面漆）：每公吨USD 5,500-7,500。用于要求最苛刻的地下矿井水暴露区域。

12.9级高强度紧固件

  • Plain或磷酸盐涂层：每公吨USD 4,000-6,000。
  • 热镀锌：每公吨USD 5,500-8,000。

不锈钢紧固件（A2/A4系列）

  • A2-70（304不锈钢）六角螺栓和螺母：每公吨USD 8,000-12,000。
  • A4-70（316不锈钢）六角螺栓和螺母：每公吨USD 10,000-15,000。

heading.hi: जिम्बाब्वे खरीदारों के लिए खनन फास्टनर खरीद चेकलिस्ट

body.en:
Use this checklist when specifying and ordering fasteners for Zimbabwe mining applications. Complete all items before placing orders to avoid site rejection, project delays, or fastener failures:

Technical Specification

  • Specify ISO 898-1:2024 property class (8.8 / 10.9 / 12.9) for carbon steel bolts
  • Specify ASTM standard (A307 / A325 / F1554) where contractually or engineering-mandated
  • Specify ISO 3506-1 for stainless steel A2/A4 fasteners
  • Confirm coating system: HDG (min. 50 μm DFT), duplex, inorganic zinc silicate, or stainless steel
  • For underground mine use: mandate HDG minimum 60 μm or duplex coating system
  • For chrome smelting: specify inorganic zinc silicate coating (NOT HDG above 200°C)
  • For cyanide service: mandate A4-70 (316 stainless) fasteners, do not substitute carbon steel HDG
  • Specify DIN 933 or GB/T 5782 dimensional standard as applicable

Documentation Requirements

  • Mill test certificates (EN 10204 Type 3.1) for each batch
  • Chemical composition report confirming alloy steel grade for 10.9 and 12.9
  • Hardness test results (Rockwell or Vickers) per ISO 898-1
  • Proof load test certificates per ISO 898-1
  • Coating thickness test report (magnetic induction method per ISO 2178)
  • Salt spray test results per ISO 9227 for coated products (minimum 200 hours for HDG, 400 hours for duplex)
  • Country of origin certificates for customs clearance at Beira Port

Logistics and Packaging

  • Bundle fasteners by grade and size; label each bundle with: standard, grade, size, quantity, batch number
  • Use sea-worthy wooden crate packaging with desiccant packs for ocean freight to Beira Port
  • Provide itemized packing list with HS codes for Zimbabwe customs clearance
  • Confirm minimum order: 1 metric ton trial order acceptable; full 20ft container (18-22 MT) for best unit price
  • Lead time: 25-35 days from order confirmation to Harare warehouse delivery
Browse our hot-dip galvanized bolts and A4-70 stainless steel fasteners.
body.zh:
在指定和订购津巴布韦采矿应用的紧固件时使用此清单。在下单前完成所有项目，以避免现场拒收、项目延误或紧固件失效：

技术规格

  • 指定ISO 898-1:2024属性等级（8.8 / 10.9 / 12.9）用于碳钢螺栓
  • 在合同或工程要求时指定ASTM标准（A307 / A325 / F1554）
  • 指定ISO 3506-1用于不锈钢A2/A4紧固件
  • 确认涂层系统：HDG（最小50 μm DFT）、双涂层、无机硅酸锌或不锈钢
  • 对于地下矿山使用：要求HDG最小60 μm或双涂层系统
  • 对于铬矿冶炼：指定无机硅酸锌涂层（200°C以上不要使用HDG）

文档要求

  • 每批次的工厂测试证书（EN 10204 Type 3.1）
  • 确认10.9和12.9合金钢等级的化学成分报告
  • ISO 898-1规定的硬度测试结果
  • ISO 898-1规定的 proof load 测试证书
  • 涂层厚度测试报告（ISO 2178磁性感应法）

q.en: What fastener grade do I need for Zimbabwe platinum mine underground operations?
q.zh: 津巴布韦铂金矿地下作业需要什么等级的紧固件？
q.es: ¿Qué grado de sujetador necesito para operaciones mineras subterráneas de platino en Zimbabwe?
q.ar: ما درجة المثبت التي أحتاجها لعمليات تعدين البلاتين تحت الأرض في زيمبابوي؟
q.fr: De quel grade de fixation ai-je besoin pour les opérations minières souterraines de platine au Zimbabwe?
q.pt: De que grau de fixador preciso para operações subterrâneas de mineração de platina no Zimbábue?
q.ru: Какой класс крепежа мне нужен для подземных операций по добыче платины в Зимбабве?
q.ja: ジンバブエのプラチナ鉱山地下作業にはどのファスナーグレードが必要ですか？
q.de: Welche Befestigungsklasse benötige ich für unterirdische Platinbergbauoperationen in Simbabwe?
q.hi: जिम्बाब्वे की भूमिगत प्लैटिनम खदान संचालन के लिए मुझे किस ग्रेड की फास्टनर की आवश्यकता है?

a.en: For Zimbabwe underground platinum group metal (PGM) mining operations at Zimplats Ngezi, Selous, Mimosa, and Unki mines, use ISO 898-1 Grade 10.9 hex bolts with hot-dip galvanizing (HDG, minimum 60 μm) as the standard specification. For primary structural steel connections in conveyor galleries, crusher foundations, and head-frames, specify ASTM A325 Type 1 HDG bolts. For the highest-stress applications—mill liner bolts, hydraulic cylinder pins, and dragline bucket joints—specify Grade 12.9 with HDG. All fasteners for underground use must have EN 10204 Type 3.1 mill test certificates and minimum 400-hour salt spray resistance per ISO 9227.
a.zh: 对于Zimplats Ngezi、Selous、Mimosa和Unki矿山的津巴布韦地下铂族金属（PGM）采矿作业，使用ISO 898-1 10.9级热镀锌六角螺栓（HDG，最小60 μm）作为标准规格。对于输送机通廊、破碎机基础和井架中的主要结构钢连接，指定ASTM A325 Type 1 HDG螺栓。对于最高应力应用——磨机衬板螺栓、液压缸销和挖掘机铲斗接头——指定12.9级HDG。所有地下使用的紧固件必须具有EN 10204 Type 3.1工厂测试证书和ISO 9227最低400小时盐雾测试耐受性。
a.es: Para operaciones mineras subterráneas de MGP en las minas Zimplats Ngezi, Selous, Mimosa y Unki de Zimbabwe, use pernos hexagonales ISO 898-1 Grado 10.9 con galvanizado en caliente (HDG, mínimo 60 μm) como especificación estándar. Para conexiones de acero estructural primario, especifique pernos ASTM A325 Tipo 1 HDG.
a.ar: لعمليات تعدين MGP تحت الأرض في مناجم Zimplats Ngezi وSelous وMimosa وUnki في زيمبابوي، استخدم براغي سداسية ISO 898-1 درجة 10.9 مع الجلفنة بالغمس الساخن (HDG، 60 μm كحد أدنى) كمواصفات قياسية. للاتصالات الفولاذية الهيكلية الأولية، حدد براغي ASTM A325 Type 1 HDG.
a.fr: Pour les opérations minières souterraines de MGP dans les mines Zimplats Ngezi, Selous, Mimosa et Unki au Zimbabwe, utilisez des boulons hexagonaux ISO 898-1 Grade 10.9 avec galvanisation à chaud (HDG, minimum 60 μm) comme spécification standard.
a.pt: Para operações subterrâneas de MGP nas minas Zimplats Ngezi, Selous, Mimosa e Unki no Zimbábue, use parafusos sextavados ISO 898-1 Grau 10.9 com galvanização por imersão a quente (HDG, mínimo 60 μm) como especificação padrão.
a.ru: Для подземных операций по добыче МПГ на рудниках Zimplats Ngezi, Selous, Mimosa и Unki в Зимбабве используйте болты с шестигранной головкой ISO 898-1 класса 10.9 с горячим цинкованием (HDG, минимум 60 μm) в качестве стандартной спецификации.
a.ja: ジンバブエのZimplats Ngezi、Selous、Mimosa、Unki矿山でのPGM地下採掘作業には、標準仕様としてISO 898-1 グレード10.9六角ボルトとホットディップめっき（HDG、60 μm以上）を使用してください。
a.de: Für Untertagebergbauoperationen von PGM in den Minen Zimplats Ngezi, Selous, Mimosa und Unki in Simbabwe verwenden Sie Sechskantschrauben ISO 898-1 Klasse 10.9 mit Feuerverzinkung (HDG, mindestens 60 μm) als Standardspezifikation.
a.hi: जिम्बाब्वे के Zimplats Ngezi, Selous, Mimosa और Unki खदानों में भूमिगत PGM खनन संचालन के लिए, मानक विशेषता के रूप में ISO 898-1 ग्रेड 10.9 हेक्स बोल्ट का उपयोग करें जिसमें हॉट-डिप गैल्वनाइजिंग (HDG, न्यूनतम 60 μm) हो।

q.en: What is the minimum order quantity for Zimbabwe mining fastener orders?
q.zh: 津巴布韦矿业紧固件订单的最小起订量是多少？
q.es: ¿Cuál es la cantidad mínima de pedido para pedidos de sujetadores mineros de Zimbabwe?
q.ar: ما هو الحد الأدنى للطلب لمشتريات مثبتات التعدين في زيمبابوي؟
q.fr: Quelle est la quantité minimum de commande pour les fixations minières au Zimbabwe?
q.pt: Qual é a quantidade mínima de pedido para fixadores de mineração do Zimbábue?
q.ru: Каково минимальное количество заказа крепежа для горнодобычи Зимбабве?
q.ja: ジンバブエ鉱業ファスナー注文の最小注文数量はいくらですか？
q.de: Wie hoch ist die Mindestbestellmenge für simbabwische Bergbau-Befestigungen?
q.hi: जिम्बाब्वे खनन फास्टनर ऑर्डर के लिए न्यूनतम ऑर्डर मात्रा क्या है?

a.en: The recommended minimum order quantity for Zimbabwe mining fastener orders is 1 metric ton for initial trial orders to verify quality and specification compliance. A full 20ft container holds approximately 18-22 metric tons of standard fasteners, which provides the best unit price and shipping economics. For Grade 10.9 HDG bolts in common sizes (M16-M24), the landed cost per ton in a full container is typically 25-35% lower than LCL (less-than-container-load) shipments. For urgent small-quantity requirements, air freight to Harare can be arranged, typically adding USD 2-4/kg to the product cost.
a.zh: 津巴布韦矿业紧固件订单的推荐最小起订量为1公吨，用于初始 trial order 以验证质量和规格合规性。完整的20尺集装箱可装载约18-22公吨标准紧固件，这提供了最佳单位价格和运输经济性。对于常见尺寸（M16-M24）的10.9级HDG螺栓，整箱运输的到岸成本通常比LCL（不足一箱）运输低25-35%。
a.es: La cantidad mínima de pedido recomendada es 1 tonelada métrica para pedidos de prueba iniciales. Un contenedor completo de 20 pies contiene aproximadamente 18-22 toneladas métricas de sujetadores estándar.
a.ar: الحد الأدنى الموصى به للطلب هو 1 طن متري لأوامر التجربة الأولية. الحاوية الكاملة 20 قدم تستوعب حوالي 18-22 طن متري من المثبتات القياسية.
a.fr: La quantité minimum de commande recommandée est de 1 tonne métrique pour les ordres d'essai initiaux. Un conteneur complet de 20 pieds contient environ 18-22 tonnes métriques de fixations standard.
a.pt: A quantidade mínima de pedido recomendada é 1 tonelada métrica para pedidos de teste iniciais. Um contêiner completo de 20 pés contém aproximadamente 18-22 toneladas métricas de fixadores padrão.
a.ru: Рекомендуемое минимальное количество заказа составляет 1 метрическую тонну для первоначальных пробных заказов. Полный 20-футовый контейнер вмещает примерно 18-22 метрических тонны стандартных крепежных изделий.
a.ja: 推奨される最小注文数量は1トンで、初回試験注文用です。20フィートフルコンテナは約18-22トンの標準ファスナーを収容できます。
a.de: Die empfohlene Mindestbestellmenge beträgt 1 Tonne für Erstbestellungen. Ein vollständiger 20-Fuß-Container fasst ca. 18-22 Tonnen Standardbefestigungen.
a.hi: जिम्बाब्वे खनन फास्टनर ऑर्डर के लिए अनुशंसित न्यूनतम ऑर्डर मात्रा 1 मीट्रिक टन है।

q.en: Can I use standard HDG bolts in Zimbabwe gold mining cyanide processing plants?
q.zh: 在津巴布韦黄金采矿氰化物选矿厂可以使用标准HDG螺栓吗？
q.es: ¿Puedo usar pernos HDG estándar en plantas de procesamiento de cianuro de minería de oro de Zimbabwe?
q.ar: هل يمكنني استخدام براغي HDG القياسية في مصانع معالجة سيانيد تعدين الذهب في زيمبابوي؟
q.fr: Puis-je utiliser des boulons HDG standard dans les usine de traitement de cyanure d'or du Zimbabwe?
q.pt: Posso usar parafusos HDG padrão em usinas de processamento de cianeto de ouro do Zimbábue?
q.ru: Можно ли использовать стандартные болты HDG на установках цианидной переработки золота в Зимбабве?
q.ja: ジンバब्वे金鉱山シアン化物処理工場で標準HDGボルトを使用できますか？
q.de: Kann ich Standard-HDG-Bolzen in simbabwischen Goldminen-Cyanidaufbereitungsanlagen verwenden?
q.hi: क्या मैं जिम्बाब्वे सोने की खदान के सायनाइड प्रसंस्करण संयंत्रों में मानक HDG बोल्ट का उपयोग कर सकता हूं?

a.en: No, standard hot-dip galvanized (HDG) carbon steel bolts should NOT be used in Zimbabwe gold mining cyanide processing circuits. Cyanide solution (NaCN at 200-500 mg/L) in the presence of dissolved oxygen and trace metals causes accelerated galvanic corrosion on zinc-coated steel. The zinc coating will corrode rapidly, producing hydrogen that can cause hydrogen embrittlement in the underlying steel, leading to fastener failure within months. For cyanide leaching tank flanges, process pipe supports, and agitation shaft connections, specify A4-70 (316 stainless steel) per ISO 3506-1. This provides the required chloride crevice corrosion resistance and long-term reliability in cyanide environments. While more expensive (USD 10,000-15,000/ton vs. USD 3,500-5,200/ton for Grade 10.9 HDG), the total cost of ownership is lower when factoring in avoided downtime from fastener replacement.
a.zh: 不，标准的热镀锌（HDG）碳钢螺栓不应在津巴布韦黄金采矿氰化物加工回路中使用。氰化物溶液（NaCN 200-500 mg/L）在溶解氧和微量金属存在下会导致镀锌钢加速 galvanic 腐蚀。对于氰化物浸出槽法兰、加工管道支架和搅拌轴连接，指定A4-70（316不锈钢）per ISO 3506-1。
a.es: No, los pernos de acero al carbono galvanizados en caliente (HDG) estándar NO deben usarse en circuitos de procesamiento de cianuro de minería de oro en Zimbabwe.
a.ar: لا، لا ينبغي استخدام براغي الفولاذ الكربوني المجلفن بالغمس الساخن (HDG) القياسية في دوائر معالجة سيانيد تعدين الذهب في زيمبابوي.
a.fr: Non, les boulons en acier au carbone galvanisés à chaud (HDG) standard NE doivent PAS être utilisés dans les circuits de traitement de cyanure d'or au Zimbabwe.
a.pt: Não, parafusos de aço carbono galvanizado por imersão a quente (HDG) padrão NÃO devem ser usados em circuitos de processamento de cianeto de ouro no Zimbábue.
a.ru: Нет, стандартные болты из горячеоцинкованной углеродистой стали (HDG) НЕ должны использоваться в цианидных перерабатывающих цепях золота в Зимбабве.
a.ja: いいえ、標準のホットディップめっき（HDG）炭素鋼ボルトはジンバブエの金的採掘シアン化物処理回路で使用すべきではありません。
a.de: Nein, Standard-Feingalvanisierte (HDG) Kohlenstoffstahlbolzen sollten NICHT in simbabwischen Goldminen-Cyanidaufbereitungskreisläufen verwendet werden.
a.hi: नहीं, मानक हॉट-डिप गैल्वनाइज्ड (HDG) कार्बन स्टील बोल्ट का उपयोग जिम्बाब्वे सोने की खदान सायनाइड प्रसंस्करण सर्किट में नहीं किया जाना चाहिए।

q.en: How long does fastener delivery from China to Zimbabwe take?
q.zh: 从中国到津巴布韦的紧固件 delivery 需要多长时间？
q.es: ¿Cuánto tarda la entrega de sujetadores de China a Zimbabwe?
q.ar: كم تستغرق تسليم المثبتات من الصين إلى زيمبابوي؟
q.fr: Combien de temps faut-il pour la livraison des fixations de la Chine au Zimbabwe?
q.pt: Quanto tempo leva a entrega de fixadores da China para o Zimbábue?
q.ru: Сколько времени занимает доставка крепежа из Китая в Зимбабве?
q.ja: 中国からジンバブエへのファスナー納品には多长时间かかりますか？
q.de: Wie lange dauert die Lieferung von Befestigungen aus China nach Simbabwe?
q.hi: चीन से जिम्बाब्वे तक फास्टनर की डिलीवरी में कितना समय लगता है?

a.en: Total door-to-door delivery time for fasteners from China to Zimbabwe is approximately 35-50 days from order confirmation, broken down as follows: Production and quality inspection: 10-15 days (for standard inventory grades like Grade 10.9 HDG; allow 20-30 days for non-stock items like ASTM F1554 Grade 105 anchor bolts). Sea freight from Tianjin or Shanghai to Beira Port, Mozambique: 20-25 days via main shipping routes. Beira Port clearance and customs documentation: 3-7 days for full-container shipments with complete documentation. Road transport from Beira to Harare warehouse: 10-14 days depending on border crossing efficiency at Mutare. For urgent requirements, air freight from Shanghai or Beijing to Harare International Airport can be arranged in 5-7 days, at approximately USD 2-4/kg additional cost.
a.zh: 从中国到津巴布韦的门到门紧固件 delivery 总时间约为35-50天，从订单确认开始。生产和质量检验：10-15天（标准库存等级如10.9级HDG；非库存物品如ASTM F1554 105级锚栓需20-30天）。海运：20-25天。贝拉港清关：3-7天。公路运输到Harare：10-14天。
a.es: El tiempo total de entrega puerta a puerta es de aproximadamente 35-50 días desde la confirmación del pedido.
a.ar: إجمالي وقت التسليم من الباب إلى الباب هو حوالي 35-50 يومًا من تأكيد الطلب.
a.fr: Le délai de livraison total de porte à porte est d'environ 35 à 50 jours à compter de la confirmation de la commande.
a.pt: O tempo total de entrega de porta a porta é de aproximadamente 35-50 dias a partir da confirmação do pedido.
a.ru: Общее время доставки от двери до двери составляет примерно 35-50 дней с момента подтверждения заказа.
a.ja: ドアtoドアの総配送時間は注文確認日から約35-50日です。
a.de: Die Gesamtlieferzeit von Tür zu Tür beträgt ca. 35-50 Tage ab Auftragsbestätigung.
a.hi: चीन से जिम्बाब्वे तक कुल डोर-टू-डोर डिलीवरी समय लगभग 35-50 दिन है।

q.en: What coating is required for chrome smelting furnace fasteners in Zimbabwe?
q.zh: 津巴布韦铬矿冶炼炉紧固件需要什么涂层？
q.es: ¿Qué recubrimiento se requiere para los sujetadores de hornos de fundición de cromo en Zimbabwe?
q.ar: ما الطلاء المطلوب لمثبتات فرن صهر الكروم في زيمبابوي؟
q.fr: Quel revêtement est requis pour les fixations de four de fusion du chrome au Zimbabwe?
q.pt: Qual revestimento é necessário para fixadores de forno de fundição de cromo no Zimbábue?
q.ru: Какое покрытие требуется для крепежа плавильных печей хрома в Зимбабве?
q.ja: ジンバブエのクロム製錬炉ファスナーにはどのコーディングが必要ですか？
q.de: Welche Beschichtung ist für Chromschmelzofenschrauben in Simbabwe erforderlich?
q.hi: जिम्बाब्वे में क्रोम प्रगलन भट्ठी के फास्टनर के लिए कौन सी कोटिंग की आवश्यकता है?

a.en: For chrome smelting electric arc furnace (EAF) fasteners in Zimbabwe operations (Zimasco, Afrochine, and others), standard hot-dip galvanizing (HDG) CANNOT be used for off-gas system and furnace shell fasteners because zinc melts at 419°C and the operating temperatures in these zones exceed 200°C. The correct specification is inorganic zinc silicate coating (minimum 80 μm dry film thickness/DFT) applied over blast-cleaned steel (Sa 2.5 per ISO 8501-1). Inorganic zinc silicate maintains corrosion resistance up to 400°C and provides cathodic protection even when the coating is partially damaged. For EAF electrode holder assemblies and water-cooled off-gas duct supports, specify Grade 12.9 socket head cap screws with inorganic zinc silicate. Budget approximately USD 6,000-9,000/ton for this specification versus USD 3,500-5,200/ton for standard Grade 10.9 HDG. The higher initial cost is justified by avoiding fastener replacement shutdowns that cost USD 10,000-50,000 per hour in lost ferrochrome production.
a.zh: 对于津巴布韦铬矿冶炼电弧炉（EAF）紧固件，标准热镀锌（HDG）不能用于废气系统和炉壳紧固件，因为锌在419°C熔化，而这些区域的工作温度超过200°C。正确的规格是无机硅酸锌涂层（最小80 μm干膜厚度/DFT）。
a.es: Para sujetadores de hornos de arco eléctrico (EAF) de fundición de cromo en Zimbabwe, el galvanizado en caliente (HDG) estándar NO puede usarse porque el zinc se derrite a 419°C.
a.ar: لمثبتات أفران القوس الكهربائي (EAF) لصهر الكروم في زيمبابوي، لا يمكن استخدام الجلفنة بالغمس الساخن (HDG) القياسية لأن الزنك يذوب عند 419 درجة مئوية.
a.fr: Pour les fixations de four à arc électrique (EAF) de fusion du chrome au Zimbabwe, la galvanisation à chaud (HDG) standard NE peut PAS être utilisée car le zinc fond à 419°C.
a.pt: Para fixadores de fornos de arco elétrico (EAF) de fundição de cromo no Zimbábue, a galvanização por imersão a quente (HDG) padrão NÃO pode ser usada porque o zinco derrete a 419°C.
a.ru: Для крепежа электродуговых печей (EAF) плавки хрома в Зимбабве стандартное горячее цинкование (HDG) НЕ может использоваться, поскольку цинк плавится при 419°C.
a.ja: ジンバブエのクロム製錬電気アーク炉（EAF）ファスナーでは、標準のホットディップめっき（HDG）は使用できません。亚鉛は419°Cで溶けるため、废ガス系と炉シェルファスナーには無機硅酸亜鉛涂层（最小80 μm DFT）を指定してください。
a.de: Für EAF-Befestigungen der Chromschmelze in Simbabwe kann die Standard-Feuerverzinkung (HDG) NICHT verwendet werden, da Zink bei 419°C schmilzt.
a.hi: जिम्बाब्वे में क्रोम प्रगलन इलेक्ट्रिक आर्क फर्नेस (EAF) फास्टनर के लिए, मानक हॉट-डिप गैल्वनाइजिंग (HDG) का उपयोग नहीं किया जा सकता क्योंकि जिंक 419°C पर पिघलता है।
